src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.PostConstruct with jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Java 21/Spring Boot 3.
Add OpenAPI security scheme definitions for Basic Auth, Bearer JWT, and Session Cookie to document authentication methods.
Update the OpenAPI contact information URL and email to reflect new support details.
Increment the API version string in the OpenAPI definition from 00.06 to 00.07.
Inject UserDataInitializationService into the application context to support new user data initialization logic.
Introduce a new ROLE_USER role alongside existing ADMIN and AGENT roles to support multi-user architecture.
Implement logic to update existing users to possess all three roles (USER, ADMIN, AGENT) and set a default current role.
Add a default 'user' account with ROLE_USER during application startup initialization.
Removed extension of the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter class to comply with Spring Security 5.7+ / 6.x standards required for Java 21 compatibility.
Replaced the deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to support method-level security in modern Spring Security.
Replaced the deprecated AuthenticationManagerBuilder configuration with a explicit DaoAuthenticationProvider bean.
Replaced the deprecated configure(HttpSecurity) method with a SecurityFilterChain bean definition.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.human_impl: public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception { ... }

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Updated authorization configuration to use the new lambda DSL and requestMatchers instead of the deprecated authorizeRequests and antMatchers.
Updated headers configuration to use the new lambda DSL for frame options.
Integrated JwtAuthenticationFilter into the security chain to support stateless JWT authentication.
Explicitly configured session management policy to IF_REQUIRED to support both stateless API and stateful web interfaces.
Added new public endpoints for registration, Swagger UI, and OAuth/JWT auth flows.
Updated role-based access control to include AGENT and USER roles for various endpoints.
Moved static resource ignoring logic from the deprecated WebSecurity configure method to permitAll in the SecurityFilterChain.

Migrate javax.websocket.server import to jakarta.websocket.server to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes required for Java 21.
Add role-based access control to the new flight GET endpoint to restrict access to administrators.
Add role-based access control to the new flight POST endpoint to restrict access to administrators.
Add role-based access control to the delete flight GET endpoint to restrict access to administrators.
Update flight retrieval logic to use a user-specific service method, likely part of the multiuser architecture migration.
Replace javax.validation import with jakarta.validation to comply with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
Replace javax.websocket import with jakarta.websocket to comply with Jakarta EE namespace changes.
Add import for Spring Security PreAuthorize annotation to enable method-level security.
Restrict access to the new airport page to users with the ADMIN role.
Restrict access to the edit airport view to users with the ADMIN role.
Restrict access to the airport edit submission endpoint to users with the ADMIN role.
Restrict access to the airport save endpoint to users with the ADMIN role.
Restrict access to the airport delete endpoint to users with the ADMIN role.
Restrict access to the new aircraft page to users with the ADMIN role.
Restrict access to the aircraft save endpoint to users with the ADMIN role.
Restrict access to the edit aircraft view to users with the ADMIN role.
Restrict access to the aircraft edit submission endpoint to users with the ADMIN role.
Restrict access to the aircraft delete endpoint to users with the ADMIN role.
Remove the custom login page endpoint, likely delegating to Spring Security's default login handling.
Replace javax.persistence and javax.validation imports with jakarta equivalents to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by modern Spring Boot versions targeting Java 21.
Add a ManyToOne relationship to a User entity to support multi-user architecture where aircraft have an owner.
Migrate JPA and Validation annotations from javax to jakarta namespace to support Jakarta EE 10+ required by modern Spring Boot versions targeting Java 21.
Add an owner field to the Airport entity to support multi-user architecture by linking airports to a specific user.
Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3 on Java 21.
Replace javax.validation.constraints imports with jakarta.validation.constraints to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3 on Java 21.
Add an owner field to the Flight model to support multi-user architecture by linking flights to a specific user.

Add a 'credentialsNonExpired' boolean field to the User model to support credential expiration status.
